tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set action deny
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-Direct-DNS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set name "Block-Ubuntu-Direct-DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-Direct-DNS"
        set uuid 4726d988-3355-51f1-9b60-beef83ce4186
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
